module_description: Monitors HTTP/HTTPS endpoints. Checks status codes, optional response content, and basic authentication. Supports GET, HEAD and POST methods.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this URL.
hints.threads: Number of URLs to check in parallel.
hints.code: Default expected HTTP response code for all URLs.
hints.server: Host or domain to check (e.g. api.domain.com). No scheme, no port. Leave empty to use the bound host's address; set a specific FQDN when one host (e.g. a reverse proxy) serves several.
hints.port: Service port. Leave empty to use the scheme's default (443 for HTTPS, 80 for HTTP); 80 and 443 are omitted from the URL. Set another port (e.g. 8006) to append it: host.domain.com:8006.
hints.path: Path appended to the URL/host (e.g. /health). Useful when the URL comes from a bound host.
hints.scheme: Protocol to use (http:// or https://). Sets the default port when none is given.
hints.method: HTTP method. HEAD is fastest (no body). POST sends an empty body.
hints.verify_ssl: Verify the server's SSL certificate. Disable only for self-signed certificates in trusted networks.
hints.check_content: Also verify that the response body contains a specific string.
hints.content_contains: String that must appear in the response body. Case-sensitive. Ignored for HEAD requests.
hints.auth_enabled: Enable HTTP Basic Authentication for this endpoint.
hints.alert: Consecutive failures before triggering an alert. Use >1 to suppress transient errors.
